# AgentsKit Registry

> Ready-to-use AI agents for AgentsKit. Install with `npx agentskit add <id>` — you own the copied source. 346 validated agents (346 in catalog, 0 draft). Browse at https://registry.agentskit.io.

- Installable index (JSON): https://registry.agentskit.io/r/index.json
- Full catalog (JSON): https://registry.agentskit.io/r/catalog.json
- Per-agent bundle (JSON): https://registry.agentskit.io/r/<id>.json
- Per-agent page (HTML): https://registry.agentskit.io/agents/<id>
- Per-agent markdown: https://registry.agentskit.io/agents/<id>.md
- MCP endpoint: https://registry.agentskit.io/api/mcp
- Full text: https://registry.agentskit.io/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://registry.agentskit.io/sitemap.xml
- Built by AgentsKit: https://www.agentskit.io

## The AgentsKit ecosystem

- [AgentsKit](https://www.agentskit.io) — The most complete agent toolkit for JavaScript. llms.txt: https://www.agentskit.io/llms.txt
- [AgentsKit OS](https://akos.agentskit.io) — The operating system for AI agents in production. llms.txt: https://akos.agentskit.io/llms.txt
- [Agents Playbook](https://playbook.agentskit.io) — Best practices for building production AI agents. llms.txt: https://playbook.agentskit.io/llms.txt

## Agents

- [Brief Generator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-brief-generator.json) — Drafts a TYPED creative brief from client kickoff notes (client/product, audience, insight, proposition, mandatories, tone, deliverables, timeline). Pulls facts only from the notes — never invents; gaps become 'to be confirmed' and are listed in toBeConfirmed. Always a draft. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-brief-generator`.
- [Client Status Report](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-client-status-report.json) — Report typed. Weekly status manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-client-status-report`.
- [Copy Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-copy-reviewer.json) — Reads draft creative against a brand-voice guide and returns TYPED misalignments (line, current text, suggested rewrite, rationale) + an overall assessment. Suggests, never imposes (never rewrites the whole piece); contentious brand-intent calls set routeToHuman for the account lead. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-copy-reviewer`.
- [Creative QA Checklist](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-creative-qa-checklist.json) — Checklist pass/fail typed. Creative QA inconsistent. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-creative-qa-checklist`.
- [Deck Builder](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-deck-builder.json) — Drafts a TYPED pitch/status deck (typed slides with bullets + citations) from project artifacts. Every number must cite its source artifact — uncited metrics are flagged in uncitedMetrics, missing data becomes 'data to be confirmed'. Configurable sections; always a draft. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-deck-builder`.
- [Media Plan Builder](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-media-plan-builder.json) — Plan per channel typed. Media plans ad-hoc. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-media-plan-builder`.
- [Production Timeline](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-production-timeline.json) — Timeline typed. Timelines chaotic. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-production-timeline`.
- [Revision Tracker](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-revision-tracker.json) — Revision log typed. Revisions lost. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-revision-tracker`.
- [Schedule Planner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-schedule-planner.json) — Drafts a TYPED multi-channel publish schedule (date/channel/asset/rationale) from approved drafts + channel constraints. Flags conflicts (window collisions, embargoes, frequency-cap breaches) instead of silently dropping items; never schedules jobs itself — always requiresApproval by the account lead. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-schedule-planner`.
- [Scope Creep Detector](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-scope-creep-detector.json) — Flags vs SOW typed. Scope creep unnoticed. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-scope-creep-detector`.
- [SOW Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-sow-drafter.json) — SOW draft typed. SOW writing slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-sow-drafter`.
- [Vendor RFP Scorer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-vendor-rfp-scorer.json) — Scorecard typed. RFP scoring subjective. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-vendor-rfp-scorer`.
- [Adverse Event Reporter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-adverse-event-reporter.json) — Report draft typed. AE reporting slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-adverse-event-reporter`.
- [Billing Code Suggester](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-billing-code-suggester.json) — ICD/CPT suggestions typed. Coding errors. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-billing-code-suggester`.
- [Care Plan Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-care-plan-author.json) — Plan typed. Care plans manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-care-plan-author`.
- [Chart Redactor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-chart-redactor.json) — Redacts HIPAA identifiers from a clinical chart with a DETERMINISTIC backstop: the model does the bulk redaction, then createPIIRedactor re-scans and strips any structured identifier it missed (email/phone/SSN + your MRN/DOB rules) — the emitted chart is always clean of those patterns regardless of the model. Clinical findings preserved. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-chart-redactor`.
- [Discharge Summary](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-discharge-summary.json) — Summary typed. Discharge docs slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-discharge-summary`.
- [Formulary Checker](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-formulary-checker.json) — Coverage typed. Coverage unknown. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-formulary-checker`.
- [Intake Triage](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-intake-triage.json) — Classifies an inbound patient message by urgency (emergency/urgent/routine/administrative/unclear) and routes it — typed output with a DETERMINISTIC red-flag safety net: chest pain / stroke / suicidal ideation / severe bleeding force 'emergency' regardless of the model (the model can only escalate, never downgrade). Unclear/emergency → human triage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-intake-triage`.
- [Lab Interpreter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-lab-interpreter.json) — Interpretation typed. Lab results hard to scan. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-lab-interpreter`.
- [Medication Reconciliation](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-medication-reconciliation.json) — Reconciliation typed. Med rec errors. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-medication-reconciliation`.
- [SOAP Generator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-note-summariser.json) — Converts clinician dictation into a TYPED SOAP note (Subjective/Objective/Assessment/Plan) via structured output; preserves facts verbatim, surfaces missing sections instead of inventing them, always a draft for clinician sign-off. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-note-summariser`.
- [Patient Summary](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-patient-summary.json) — Drafts a TYPED one-page pre-visit summary from chart excerpts (reason, active problems, meds, allergies, vitals trend, follow-ups, open questions); never invents values, always a draft for clinician confirmation. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-patient-summary`.
- [Prior Auth Pack](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-prior-auth-pack.json) — Pack draft typed. Prior auth paperwork. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-prior-auth-pack`.
- [Referral Router](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-referral-router.json) — Routes a referral packet to the receiving specialty + urgency with typed output. Incomplete packets are NOT assigned — missing critical fields (reason/meds/prior workup) are surfaced and the case escalates to a human coordinator. Fail-safe on error. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-referral-router`.
- [Telehealth Intake](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-telehealth-intake.json) — Intake typed. Telehealth intake unstructured. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-telehealth-intake`.
- [Trial Eligibility](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-trial-eligibility.json) — Eligibility typed. Trial matching manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-trial-eligibility`.
- [Code Review](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/code-review.json) — Deep, low-noise code review: 7 focused lenses (correctness, security, performance, maintainability, design, tests, conventions) fan out per file, then every finding is adversarially verified before thresholds apply. Typed findings with applicable patches. Inputs: local git diff, GitHub PR, files, or a snippet. Outputs: Markdown, SARIF, or PR comments. Blocking CI gate. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add code-review`.
- [Accessibility Auditor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-accessibility-auditor.json) — WCAG findings typed. a11y regressions in PRs. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-accessibility-auditor`.
- [API Contract Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-api-contract-reviewer.json) — Breaking/non-breaking diff typed. Breaking API changes. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-api-contract-reviewer`.
- [Changelog from Commits](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-changelog-from-commits.json) — Grouped changelog citing SHAs. Manual changelogs. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-changelog-from-commits`.
- [Code QA](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-code-qa.json) — Runs the project's test/lint/type-check commands through a caller-injected runner, then turns the REAL captured output into a TYPED failure report (shortest reproducer, message, root cause), grouped by cause. Execution stays in YOUR sandbox (no shell spawned by the agent); reports, never fixes. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-code-qa`.
- [Database Query Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-database-query-reviewer.json) — SQL findings typed. N+1 and missing indexes. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-database-query-reviewer`.
- [Dependency Auditor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-dependency-auditor.json) — Findings per package typed. CVEs and stale deps. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-dependency-auditor`.
- [Dev Implementer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-dev-implementer.json) — Proposes a TYPED minimal patch plan (file changes with full new contents + PR title + notes) that makes the QA specs pass. Proposes, never writes (the plan is data you apply); optional openPr transport turns the approved plan into a real PR, fail-closed HITL. House rules: named exports, Zod at boundaries, no any. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-dev-implementer`.
- [Feature Flag Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-feature-flag-reviewer.json) — Risk findings typed. Risky flags in PRs. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-feature-flag-reviewer`.
- [i18n Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-i18n-reviewer.json) — i18n findings typed. Hardcoded/missing strings. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-i18n-reviewer`.
- [Incident Postmortem](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-incident-postmortem.json) — Timeline + RCA + actions typed. Post-incident chaos. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-incident-postmortem`.
- [Issue Creator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-issue-creator.json) — Drafts one TYPED GitHub issue per PRD acceptance criterion, then creates them through a caller-injected createIssue transport. Real creation or honest draft (no transport => drafts + created:[], never a faked number); fail-closed HITL (no approve + autoApprove off => nothing created); reports the real issue number/url. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-issue-creator`.
- [License Compliance](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-license-compliance.json) — Conflicts typed. Incompatible OSS licenses. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-license-compliance`.
- [Migration Planner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-migration-planner.json) — Steps + rollback + blast radius typed. Risky schema/API migrations. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-migration-planner`.
- [Monorepo Impact Analyzer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-monorepo-impact.json) — Affected packages typed. Blast radius unknown. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-monorepo-impact`.
- [Observability Gap Finder](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-observability-gap.json) — Gaps per service typed. Missing metrics/logs. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-observability-gap`.
- [On-call Handoff](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-oncall-handoff.json) — Handoff typed: incidents, risks, next steps. Shift changes lose context. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-oncall-handoff`.
- [Performance Interpreter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-performance-interpreter.json) — Bottlenecks typed. Lighthouse/bundle reports opaque. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-performance-interpreter`.
- [PRD Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-prd-author.json) — Transforms a free-form product description into a TYPED PRD (problem, users, 3-5 testable acceptance criteria, out-of-scope, open questions). Never invents business logic — anything absent from the input becomes an open question. Always a draft. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-prd-author`.
- [QA Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-qa-author.json) — Turns a PRD's acceptance criteria into TYPED Vitest spec stubs (one+ describe/it block per criterion, each referencing its number). Returns { specs: [{ path, body, criteria }] } and flags uncovered criteria rather than silently dropping coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-qa-author`.
- [Release Notes Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-release-notes-drafter.json) — Turns the list of merged PRs since the last tag into TYPED, grouped release notes (Feature/Fix/Performance/Docs/Internal) + a ready-to-paste markdown block. Every entry cites its PR number; never invents a merge not in the input. Always a draft for the release manager. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-release-notes-drafter`.
- [Runbook from Incident](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-runbook-from-incident.json) — Runbook draft typed. Incidents not captured as runbooks. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-runbook-from-incident`.
- [SBOM Generator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-sbom-generator.json) — SBOM summary typed. Supply chain audits. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-sbom-generator`.
- [Security Scanner Interpreter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-security-scanner-interpreter.json) — Grouped findings + FP flags typed. SARIF/semgrep noise. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-security-scanner-interpreter`.
- [Tech Debt Scorer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-tech-debt-scorer.json) — Scored items: impact/effort/risk. Refactor prioritization. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-tech-debt-scorer`.
- [Test Runner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-test-runner.json) — Parses raw Vitest stdout/stderr into a TYPED test report: totals + per-failure details (test, file, message, one-sentence root-cause hypothesis), grouped by suspected cause. Analyses captured output; does not execute anything itself. Reports only what the output shows, never invents. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-test-runner`.
- [Breach Notification BR](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-breach-notification-br.json) — Notice draft typed. LGPD 72h notice. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-breach-notification-br`.
- [Consent Record Auditor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-consent-record-auditor.json) — Audit typed. Consent gaps. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-consent-record-auditor`.
- [Cookie Policy Auditor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-cookie-policy-auditor.json) — Audit typed. Cookie compliance. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-cookie-policy-auditor`.
- [Cross-border Transfer Memo](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-cross-border-transfer-memo.json) — Memo typed. Transfer risk. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-cross-border-transfer-memo`.
- [Data Retention Planner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-data-retention-planner.json) — Plan typed. Retention policies. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-data-retention-planner`.
- [GDPR DPIA Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-gdpr-dpia-drafter.json) — DPIA typed. DPIA manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-gdpr-dpia-drafter`.
- [LGPD Assessor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-lgpd-assessor.json) — Assessment typed. LGPD gap analysis. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-lgpd-assessor`.
- [LGPD DPA Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/compliance-lgpd-dpa-reviewer.json) — Findings typed. DPA review BR. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: compliance. Install: `npx agentskit add compliance-lgpd-dpa-reviewer`.
- [Blog Outline](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-blog-outline.json) — Outline typed. Blog structure. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-blog-outline`.
- [Evergreen Refresher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-evergreen-refresher.json) — Refresh plan typed. Stale content. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-evergreen-refresher`.
- [Fact Checker](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-fact-checker.json) — Claims typed. Facts unverified. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-fact-checker`.
- [Glossary Builder](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-glossary-builder.json) — Glossary typed. Terminology inconsistent. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-glossary-builder`.
- [Internal Link Planner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-internal-link-planner.json) — Plan typed. Internal linking weak. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-internal-link-planner`.
- [Newsletter Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-newsletter-author.json) — Newsletter typed. Newsletters slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-newsletter-author`.
- [Podcast Show Notes](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-podcast-show-notes.json) — Notes typed. Show notes manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-podcast-show-notes`.
- [Repurpose Matrix](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-repurpose-matrix.json) — Matrix typed. Content repurposing. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-repurpose-matrix`.
- [Style Guide Enforcer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-style-guide-enforcer.json) — Violations typed. Style drift. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-style-guide-enforcer`.
- [Transcript Cleaner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-transcript-cleaner.json) — Clean transcript typed. Messy transcripts. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-transcript-cleaner`.
- [Translation Localizer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-translation-localizer.json) — Localized copy typed. Localization quality. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-translation-localizer`.
- [YouTube Metadata](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/content-youtube-metadata.json) — Metadata typed. YT SEO weak. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: content. Install: `npx agentskit add content-youtube-metadata`.
- [A/B Test Interpreter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-ab-test-interpreter.json) — Interpretation typed. A/B results misread. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-ab-test-interpreter`.
- [Anomaly Explainer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-anomaly-explainer.json) — Explanation typed. Anomalies unexplained. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-anomaly-explainer`.
- [Cohort Analyzer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-cohort-analyzer.json) — Insights typed. Cohort analysis slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-cohort-analyzer`.
- [Data Contract Validator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-contract-validator.json) — Violations typed. Contract violations. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-contract-validator`.
- [Dashboard Spec Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-dashboard-spec-author.json) — Spec typed. Dashboard specs ad-hoc. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-dashboard-spec-author`.
- [dbt Model Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-dbt-model-reviewer.json) — Findings typed. dbt quality issues. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-dbt-model-reviewer`.
- [ETL Failure Diagnoser](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-etl-failure-diagnoser.json) — Diagnosis typed. ETL failures opaque. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-etl-failure-diagnoser`.
- [Feature Store Documenter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-feature-store-documenter.json) — Docs typed. Features undocumented. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-feature-store-documenter`.
- [Data Governance Classifier](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-governance-classifier.json) — Classification typed. Classification missing. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-governance-classifier`.
- [Lineage Tracer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-lineage-tracer.json) — Lineage typed. Lineage unknown. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-lineage-tracer`.
- [Metric Definer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-metric-definer.json) — Definition typed. Metric definitions vague. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-metric-definer`.
- [PII Column Scanner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-pii-column-scanner.json) — Columns typed. PII in tables. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-pii-column-scanner`.
- [Data Quality Rule Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-quality-rule-author.json) — Rules typed. DQ rules manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-quality-rule-author`.
- [Report Narrator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-report-narrator.json) — Narrative typed. Reports need narrative. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-report-narrator`.
- [Schema Documenter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-schema-documenter.json) — Docs typed. Undocumented schemas. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-schema-documenter`.
- [Semantic Layer Mapper](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-semantic-layer-mapper.json) — Map typed. Semantic layer drift. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-semantic-layer-mapper`.
- [Snowflake Cost Optimizer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-snowflake-cost-optimizer.json) — Recommendations typed. Warehouse cost. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-snowflake-cost-optimizer`.
- [SQL Generator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-sql-generator.json) — SQL typed. SQL from questions. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-sql-generator`.
- [SQL Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-sql-reviewer.json) — Findings typed. Unsafe SQL. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-sql-reviewer`.
- [Warehouse Migration Planner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/data-warehouse-migration.json) — Plan typed. DW migrations risky. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: data. Install: `npx agentskit add data-warehouse-migration`.
- [Backup Restore Verifier](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/devops-backup-restore-verifier.json) — Verification typed. Backup untested. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: devops. Install: `npx agentskit add devops-backup-restore-verifier`.
- [Capacity Forecaster](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/devops-capacity-forecaster.json) — Forecast typed. Capacity surprises. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: devops. Install: `npx agentskit add devops-capacity-forecaster`.
- [Change Advisory](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/devops-change-advisory.json) — Advisory typed. CAB reviews slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: devops. Install: `npx agentskit add devops-change-advisory`.
- [CI Failure Grouper](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/devops-ci-failure-grouper.json) — Groups typed. CI noise. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: devops. Install: `npx agentskit add devops-ci-failure-grouper`.
- [Compliance Evidence](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/devops-compliance-evidence.json) — Evidence typed. SOC2 evidence. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: devops. Install: `npx agentskit add devops-compliance-evidence`.

Typed risk verdict + human sign-off. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-kyc-screener`.

- [Sanctions Screener](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-sanctions-screener.json) — Screens a customer/counterparty against a sanctions list with a DETERMINISTIC fuzzy-match gate: strong/exact hits escalate unconditionally (never model-cleared), the model only adjudicates weak near-misses (and can only make screening stricter). Typed verdict + human sign-off. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-sanctions-screener`.

- [Transaction Investigator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-transaction-investigator.json) — Scans a transaction history for anomalous patterns (velocity, structuring, geo, round-number, rapid-movement) and drafts a TYPED case file as canonical Findings citing the transaction IDs + rule. Two modes (fraud / aml SAR-ready); always a draft for human review, fail-safe (insufficientEvidence over false positives), never freezes accounts or files SARs. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-transaction-investigator`.

- [Knowledge Promoter Agent](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/knowledge-promoter.json) — Turns curated private notes into public documentation PRs — classify, sanitize to vendor-neutral, adversarial leak-gate, then open one draft PR. Never merges; a human reviews. Category: ops. Install: `npx agentskit add knowledge-promoter`.
- [Case Analyst](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-case-analyst.json) — Extracts a TYPED structured analysis from a case file (parties, venue, posture, claims, defenses, key dates, open discovery). Every datum cites its source document + page; gaps are 'not in record' (never inferred); SOL/filing-deadline risks surfaced separately. Always a draft for the attorney. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-case-analyst`.
- [Case Summariser](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-case-summariser.json) — Produces a TYPED, court-ready matter summary from reviewed documents + reviewer notes. Every factual claim cites the underlying document ID; inconsistent notes are flagged as conflicts (competing positions surfaced) rather than resolved by picking a side. Always a draft for the attorney. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-case-summariser`.
- [Clause Comparator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-clause-comparator.json) — Diff typed. Clause diffs tedious. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-clause-comparator`.
- [Deposition Prep](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-deposition-prep.json) — Question bank typed. Depo prep unstructured. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-deposition-prep`.
- [Doc Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-doc-drafter.json) — Drafts a legal document (memo / motion / demand-letter / client-update) from an approved fact pattern. Cites every factual claim to its source record; flags every inference inline + in a typed list for attorney verification; ALWAYS a draft (never final, never a signature) ending with open questions for sign-off. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-doc-drafter`.
- [Legal Doc Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-doc-reviewer.json) — One configurable legal-review agent (mode: contract | discovery | privilege) that supersedes the separate contract-reviewer, discovery-reviewer, and privilege-spotter. Produces typed findings via structured output; privileged/high findings require attorney review. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-doc-reviewer`.
- [eDiscovery Privilege Log](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-ediscovery-privilege-log.json) — Log typed. Privilege logs manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-ediscovery-privilege-log`.
- [Exhibit Indexer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-exhibit-indexer.json) — Index typed. Exhibits disorganized. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-exhibit-indexer`.
- [Jurisdiction Analyzer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-jurisdiction-analyzer.json) — Analysis typed. Jurisdiction risk unclear. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-jurisdiction-analyzer`.
- [Legal Hold Notice](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-legal-hold-notice.json) — Notice draft typed. Hold notices manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-legal-hold-notice`.
- [NDA Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-nda-reviewer.json) — Findings typed. NDA review bottleneck. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-nda-reviewer`.
- [Obligation Tracker](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-obligation-tracker.json) — Obligations typed. Contract obligations missed. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-obligation-tracker`.
- [Redaction Bot](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-redaction-bot.json) — Redacts PII from a legal document with a DETERMINISTIC backstop (createPIIRedactor strips any structured identifier the model missed — SSN/email/phone + your gov-ID/account rules), and surfaces privileged spans for attorney review instead of silently redacting them. Output is always clean of the covered patterns. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-redaction-bot`.
- [Regulatory Filing Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-regulatory-filing-drafter.json) — Filing typed. Filings slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-regulatory-filing-drafter`.
- [Settlement Memo](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-settlement-memo.json) — Memo typed. Settlement analysis slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-settlement-memo`.

- [Brand Compliance](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-brand-compliance.json) — Violations vs guide typed. Off-brand copy ships. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-brand-compliance`.
- [Brief Analyst](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-brief-analyst.json) — Reads an incoming campaign brief and produces a TYPED structured brief (objective/audience/key messages/tone/channels/timeline/mandatories) downstream agents reference. Never invents client details; missing required fields listed in gaps (ask, don't guess); optional voice guide flags conflicting language. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-brief-analyst`.
- [Calendar Digest Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-calendar-digest-author.json) — Turns the week's scheduled social posts into a TYPED digest (per-channel groups + a ready-to-paste Slack markdown block). Delivery is optional and HITL-gated — reported delivered only when the transport really returned an id; never fakes a post. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-calendar-digest-author`.
- [Competitor Researcher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-competitor-researcher.json) — Searches + fetches competitor web content (webSearch / fetchUrl), diffs it against the RAG competitor baseline, and produces a structured competitive-landscape report. Hardened: fetched pages are treated as attacker-controlled data (prompt-injection defense), and unfetchable sources are flagged, never fabricated. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-competitor-researcher`.
- [Copy Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-copy-author.json) — Produces exactly THREE distinct TYPED copy variants (bold / warm / precise) from a structured brief + competitive context — each with headline/subheadline/body/cta/channel/persona/rationale. Every metric must come from the brief (no invented numbers); over-length bodies flagged, not silently cut. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-copy-author`.
- [Email Sequence Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-email-sequence-author.json) — Sequence typed. Drip campaigns manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-email-sequence-author`.

- [Bug Repro Guide](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-bug-repro-guide.json) — Repro steps typed. Bugs without repro. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-bug-repro-guide`.
- [Churn Risk Scorer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-churn-risk-scorer.json) — Risk score typed. Silent churn. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-churn-risk-scorer`.
- [CSAT Response Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-csat-response-drafter.json) — Response draft typed. Negative CSAT slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-csat-response-drafter`.
- [Escalation Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-escalation-drafter.json) — Turns a ticket + agent notes into a TYPED internal escalation draft (impact / tried / need / SLA). A deterministic PII backstop re-scans every field and strips raw email / phone / ids the model leaked; always a draft for the agent to review before posting. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-escalation-drafter`.
- [Feature Request Clusterer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-feature-clusterer.json) — Clusters typed. FRs scattered. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-feature-clusterer`.
- [Account Health Summary](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-health-summary.json) — Health summary typed. Account reviews manual. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-health-summary`.
- [KB Searcher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-kb-searcher.json) — Matches a support ticket to the top knowledge-base articles as TYPED hits with a 1-5 confidence score. Optional retriever grounds answers in YOUR corpus — only retrieved candidates can be cited; never invents an article (returns noMatch + a suggested topic instead). Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-kb-searcher`.
- [Macro Suggester](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-macro-suggester.json) — Macro draft typed. Repetitive replies. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-macro-suggester`.
- [Multilingual Reply Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-multilang-reply-drafter.json) — Reply draft typed. i18n support slow. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-multilang-reply-drafter`.
- [Onboarding Gap Finder](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-onboarding-gap-finder.json) — Gaps typed. Onboarding failures. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-onboarding-gap-finder`.
- [Refund Evaluator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-refund-evaluator.json) — Decision + rationale typed. Refund decisions inconsistent. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-refund-evaluator`.
- [SLA Breach Alerter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-sla-breach-alerter.json) — Alert typed. SLA misses late. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-sla-breach-alerter`.
- [Triage Bot](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-triage-bot.json) — Classifies an inbound support ticket by topic + severity (P1-P4) + queue with TYPED output, and a deterministic red-flag net that forces P1 on outage / data-loss / security language (the model can only raise severity, never bury a P1). Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-triage-bot`.
